creator: lordsith49@hotmail.com
text:
Kerberos/GSSAPI support in the security/openssh-portable is currently marked as BROKEN because there was no patch available for OpenSSH 5.2p1 at the time the port version was bumped.

There is now a patch listed as available:

http://www.sxw.org.uk/computing/patches/openssh.html

How-To-Repeat: n/a
